title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Lynbrook, NY | $900 – $2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Lynbrook, Long Island. Safe, humane bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Dealing with bats in your Lynbrook home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides professional bat removal and exclusion services tailored to the unique needs of Long Island properties. Our licensed technicians use humane, effective methods to safely remove bats and prevent their return, protecting your family and property from health risks and structural damage.
whyUs: With years of experience serving Lynbrook and surrounding Long Island communities, we understand local bat species and seasonal patterns. Our comprehensive approach includes thorough inspections, safe removal, complete exclusion, cleanup, and long-term prevention—all backed by our satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Lynbrook's mix of historic homes near the Village Green and newer residential developments provides numerous entry points where bats commonly roost in attics, soffits, and chimneys. The proximity to Greis Park and tree-lined neighborhoods creates ideal habitats for bats, making professional exclusion essential for homeowners throughout the community.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Lynbrook?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Lynbrook typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, colony size, number of entry points, and the complexity of exclusion work required. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before any work begins.

faqs.question: Are bats common in Lynbrook, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Yes, bats are common throughout Lynbrook and Long Island. The most frequent species include little brown bats and big brown bats, which often roost in attics, walls, and chimneys of residential homes. They're particularly active from spring through fall and may hibernate in structures during winter months.

faqs.question: Is bat removal safe and humane?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We follow all New York State regulations for humane bat exclusion, which means we never trap or harm bats. Instead, we use one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave naturally but prevent re-entry. We also observe seasonal restrictions to protect bat maternity colonies with young pups.

faqs.question: What does the bat exclusion process include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a detailed inspection to locate all entry points and assess the infestation, installation of one-way exclusion devices, sealing of all potential entry points with durable materials, attic cleanup and sanitation if needed, and a warranty to ensure bats don't return. The entire process typically takes 2-4 weeks to ensure all bats have safely exited.
